title: Kannitheevu Ponna Song Lyrics Yutham Sei
stanzas: <div>Kannitheevu Ponna Song Lyrics Yutham Sei

Kanni theevu ponnaa
katterumbu kannaa
kattumara thuduppa
pola iduppa aatturaa
iva kallu paanaa udhatta
kaati kaduppu yaethuraa (2)

mathaappu pola
sirichitu ponaa
kithaappu ellaam
midhichitu ponaa

indha vappaatiya paarthu
en pondaatiya maranthen
ivan mundhaanaya modhi
naan moppam pudichu
nadanthen.

Kanni theevu ponnaa
katterumbu kannaa
kattumara thuduppa
pola iduppa aatturaa
iva kallu paanaa udhatta
kaati kaduppu yaethuraa

Manja seelaiyodu
oru maasi karuvaadu
vattam poatu aadu
idhu vaanavillu roadu

tharpoosu pazhathukke
nee thenneer kaattaatha

kadichaa kasakkaatha
sweetu beedaa nee
kudichaa yaeppam varum
goli sodaa nee

idichaa usuru pogum
thanni lorry nee
adichaa podha varum
pondichery nee

un sammaththa sonnaa
en sambalatha tharuven
nee kai naluvi ponaaa
naan kannagiya azhuven

Kanni theevu ponnaa
katterumbu kannaa
kattumara thuduppa
pola iduppa aatturaa
iva kallu paanaa udhatta
kaati kaduppu yaethuraa

vennilaa cake-u
ena vittu thara naakku
kollikatta naakku
ena koppalamaa aakku

tanjavooru thatta yendhi
pichcha kaetkaatha

urutti vilaiyaadum
thaaya katta nee
vazhuki vila vaikkum
vazhamatta nee

manakkum malaiyaala
kozhaa puttu nee
thirumbi paakkaatha
thenavettu nee

iva kannakuzhiyodu
vandhu pallanguzhi aadu
enna muthamittu moodu
konjam saththunavu poadu

Kanni theevu ponnaa
katterumbu kannaa
kattumara thuduppa
pola iduppa aatturaa
iva kallu paanaa udhatta
kaati kaduppu yaethuraa

mathaappu pola
sirichitu ponaa
kithaappu ellaam
midhichitu ponaa

indha vappaatiya paarthu
en pondaatiya maranthen
ivan mundhaanaya modhi
naan moppam pudichu
nadanthen.
Kanni theevu ponnaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the release year of the song Kannitheevu Ponna?

The song was released in 2011.

Who is the singer of Kannitheevu Ponna?

The song is sung by MLR Karthikeyan.

Who composed the music for Yuddham Sei?

The music was composed by KrishnaKumar(K).

What is the theme of the song Kannitheevu Ponna?

The song is an energetic and peppy dance number.

What is the context of the song in the movie Yuddham Sei?

The song adds a lively and vibrant element to the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannitheevu Ponna from Yuddham Sei is a high-energy dance number that captivates with its vibrant beats and lively rhythm. Sung by MLR Karthikeyan, the track is designed to energize and entertain, making it a perfect fit for party scenes. The song's dynamic composition by KrishnaKumar adds to its appeal, creating a memorable musical experience. It stands out as a highlight in the film, bringing a burst of energy to the storyline.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the pulsating energy of Kannitheevu Ponna from the movie Yuddham Sei. MLR Karthikeyan's dynamic vocals combined with KrishnaKumar's vibrant music create an unforgettable dance number. Dive into this electrifying track that promises to set the stage on fire!
stanzaMeanings: If the island is a girl, the waist moves like a tree swaying in the wind. Her lips are like stone, showing anger.
She smiled like a firecracker, and everything around her burst.
Looking at this woman, I forgot my wife. He came forward, and I walked away quietly.
If the island is a girl, the waist moves like a tree swaying in the wind. Her lips are like stone, showing anger.
With a yellow saree, she dances in a circle like a rainbow road.
You don't show the juice to the watermelon fruit.
If you bite, it won't taste bitter. If you drink, you'll get hiccups.
If you hit, life will go away like a water truck. If you hit, you'll reach Pondicherry.
If you agree, I'll give my salary. If you touch me, I'll cry like Kannagi.
If the island is a girl, the waist moves like a tree swaying in the wind. Her lips are like stone, showing anger.
If you give me a moon cake, make my tongue sweet like sugar.
Holding a Tanjore plate, not begging for alms.
You play like a spinning top, but you slip and fall.
You are like a fragrant Kerala puttu, don't turn back and look.
She comes with dimples and plays games, gives a kiss and closes her eyes, and serves some food.
If the island is a girl, the waist moves like a tree swaying in the wind. Her lips are like stone, showing anger.
She smiled like a firecracker, and everything around her burst.
Looking at this woman, I forgot my wife. He came forward, and I walked away quietly.
